name: Pickled Red Onions
recipeIngredient: 1 Beet, trimmed, peeled and cut into 8 wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the onions in a medium saucepan and pour in enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, then remove from the heat.
2. Strain the onions and set them aside.
3. Combine all remaining ingredients in the saucepan.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce to a simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Transfer the mixture to a container, cover, and refrigerate at least one day before serving.
Makes 5 1/2 cups
Pickled onions will keep in the refrigerator up to a month.
